---
title: "Prince and the Page: A Story of the Last Crusade, The By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Prince and the Page: A Story of the Last Crusade, The By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1866
**Genre:** Fiction (historical)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and Cambridge: Macmillan and Co.,

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
